## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and its scope.

## Validation

- [ ] Ran the relevant command from `AGENTS.md`, or explained why it was not applicable.
- [ ] Confirmed route changes do not hand-edit `src/routeTree.gen.ts`.
- [ ] Reviewed native permissions or configuration when changing `src-tauri/`.

## Notes

List deferred work, migration considerations, or follow-up tasks.
<!-- agentkit:end pull-request-template -->
